Indoor Interactive
Training with
Kinomap

Now in Bangladesh

Less 'at home', more 'out there'. Reimagine indoor training with Kinomap's interactive app — featuring 40,000+ real-life training videos from the world's most stunning routes.

40K +
Training Videos
195 +
Countries
2M +
Active Users

Sprint Through Forests & City Streets

Feel the forest floor beneath your feet or the pulse of a city run. Your treadmill's incline changes automatically to mirror the real route's elevation.

Auto Resistance
Real-Time Stats
GPS Tracking
Heart Rate Zones

Row Along Rivers & Open Waters

Glide through scenic waterways from around the world. Your rower's resistance adapts to simulate real water currents and conditions.

Auto Resistance
Real-Time Stats
GPS Tracking
Heart Rate Zones

Conquer Mountain Passes & Coastal Roads

Experience the thrill of climbing alpine switchbacks and cruising seaside routes. Kinomap automatically adjusts your bike's resistance to match the terrain in real-time.

Auto Resistance
Real-Time Stats
GPS Tracking
Heart Rate Zones

Everything You Need To Train Smarter

Kinomap transforms your cardio equipment into an immersive, interactive training experience.

Scenic Videos

Explore 40,000+ real-life training routes from every corner of the world. Mountains, coastlines, cities — ride them all

Coaching Sessions

Follow expert coaches with structured workout programs designed to push your limits and track your progress

GPS Tracks

Upload your own GPS routes or challenge other users on public tracks. Your outdoor routes, indoors.

Multiplayer Mode

Challenge friends, join live sessions, and compete in real-time with riders and runners worldwide

Up & Running in 4 Steps

01

Get Equipment

Purchase a Kinomap-compatible machine from Shah Sports

02

Download App

Install Kinomap on your smartphone, tablet, or smart TV

03

Connect via Bluetooth

Pair your equipment with the app for auto-resistance control

04

Start Training

Choose a route, hit play, and explore the world from home

Download Kinomap
Today

Available on iOS, Android, Apple TV, and Android TV. Connect your equipment and start exploring the world from home.

Download on theApp Store
Get it onGoogle Play
